result.stdout:
Description:
  Fifth Language Compiler (fifthc)

Usage:
  compiler [options]

Options:
  --command <command>                    The command to execute: build (default), run, lint, help [default: build]
  --source <source>                      Source file or directory path
  --source-manifest <source-manifest>    Path to a manifest file listing .5th source modules
  --output <output>                      Output executable path
  --output-type <output-type>            Output type: Exe or Library [default: Exe]
  --reference <reference>                Assembly reference path
  --target-framework <target-framework>  Target-framework moniker (e.g. net8.0, net9.0). Drives runtime-config generation. [default: net10.0]
  --args <args>                          Arguments to pass to the program when running
  --keep-temp                            Keep temporary files
  --diagnostics                          Enable diagnostic output
  --version                              Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                         Show help and usage information
